steps.title: Find the passage's focus
steps.content: The passage opens with dandelions as unwanted weeds, then immediately shifts with “Although… weeds like this do provide some benefits.” The focus of the passage is on the benefits weeds can provide.

steps.title: Match the focus to the answer choices
steps.content: Choice A directly states this focus: some weeds can be beneficial. Choices B, C, and D address different topics entirely. That matches choice A — A is correct.
